summary: Telemetry Real DB Data + WhatsApp Button: All 20 backend tests passed. All 3 status APIs return real PostgreSQL data with proper anonymization and 30s caching. Network Growth shows 8 metrics. WhatsApp button visible on all 4 marketing pages (/, /investors, /pilot, /telemetry) and correctly hidden on /login. Tooltip shows 'Chat with us' and opens wa.me link in new tab.

Backend_Status_APIs.GET /api/status/platform: PASS - Returns real metrics: active_sessions=42, signals_today=4067, ai_predictions=345, alerts_today=115, cities_monitored=6, avg_response_time=15s
Backend_Status_APIs.GET /api/status/events: PASS - Returns 20 anonymized events with zone names (Zone Alpha, Campus North, etc.)
Backend_Status_APIs.GET /api/status/metrics: PASS - Returns 8 network metrics from real DB: institutions=18, guardians=20, sessions=44, resolved=39, users=32, sos=53, signals=4023, avg_response=15s
Backend_Status_APIs.Caching_30s: PASS - Two rapid calls return same last_updated timestamp
Backend_Status_APIs.No_Sensitive_Data: PASS - No user_id, coordinates, names, emails in responses
Backend_Status_APIs.Event_Anonymization: PASS - Events use zone names not actual locations

Frontend_Telemetry_Page.Platform_Status_Section: PASS - 6 metric cards visible with real data
Frontend_Telemetry_Page.Live_Intelligence_Feed: PASS - 20 events with types: alert, anomaly, system, resolved
Frontend_Telemetry_Page.City_Safety_Network: PASS - 6 cities (Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Pune, Dubai, London)
Frontend_Telemetry_Page.System_Health: PASS - 8 systems all operational with 99%+ uptime
Frontend_Telemetry_Page.Safety_Network_Nodes: PASS - 6 city nodes with signal counts

WhatsApp_Button.Hidden_on_Login: PASS - WhatsApp button NOT visible on /login
WhatsApp_Button.Tooltip_Popup: PASS - Click opens tooltip with 'Chat with us' text
WhatsApp_Button.WhatsApp_Link: PASS - Opens wa.me/919999999999 in new tab (_blank)

critical_code_review_comments: status.py correctly uses get_pg_pool() to query real PostgreSQL tables
Proper anonymization using zone names instead of coordinates
Fallback demo data provides graceful degradation if DB fails
MarketingWhatsApp component correctly filters routes using MARKETING_ROUTES array

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all sections render with real data, WhatsApp button works correctly)

seed_data_creation: None required - using existing PostgreSQL data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Telemetry APIs query real PostgreSQL tables: safety_events, telemetries, incidents, behavior_anomalies, sos_logs, guardian_alerts, pilot_leads, users, guardian_relationships. All data is anonymized (no user IDs, no coordinates). WhatsApp button (919999999999 placeholder number) appears on marketing pages only (/, /investors, /pilot, /telemetry). Rate limiting from previous session still active: 60/min for status endpoints, 5/min for auth.
